'''Mavis''' was a young [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] child who participated in the evacuation of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. She had a brother named [[Tarn (Rebellion)|Tarn]].<ref name="TMDF" />
